11063651-998e-4d2d-8caa-e284eb26ce89.label: Walking in Montreal through an Alleyway in Villeray

children.text: A "Chaz On the Go" walking vlog through a Villeray ruelle vert, from Rue Jules-Verre to Rue Liège, between Rue Gaspé and Rue Henri-Julien, September 2nd, 2022, at 9:15AM.

label: Villeray, Rue Jules-Verre to Rue Liège, between Rue Gaspé and Rue Henri-Julien
